title: centaurea × bollui
intro: Centaurea × bollui, also known as Boll's knapweed or Boll's centaury, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Centaurea × bollui include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to treat a range of health issues, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
